message:
fix: Handle phrase queries correctly in REPL search

Fixes #1 - Phrase queries (quoted strings) were failing because
prefix_field uses IndexRecordOption::Basic which doesn't store
positions needed for phrase matching.

Now detects quoted phrases and excludes prefix_field from query
parser fields, using only text_field which has positions indexed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
